Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --entrypoint cat keyfactor/signserver-ce:latest /etc/os-release 2>&1 | head -10)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --entrypoint sh keyfactor/signserver-ce:latest -c "which yum microdnf rpm 2>/dev/null; ls /usr/bin/*dnf* /usr/bin/*yum* /usr/bin/*rpm* 2>/dev/null || echo 'nothing found'; ls /usr/sbin/microdnf 2>/dev/null || true" 2>&1)

chown -R 10001:root /opt/keyfactor/persistent/softhsm/ &&
chmod -R 755 /opt/keyfactor/persistent/softhsm/
" 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver softhsm2-util --show-slots 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver find / -name "signserver-deploy-configuration*.properties" 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "---" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver cat /opt/signserver/res/deploytools/signserver_deploy.properties 2>/dev/null | grep -i "sharedlib\\|pkcs11\\|softhsm\\|p11" || echo "no deploy props" && echo "---" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver find / -name "*pkcs11*" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ra setendentitystatus ivf-signer-1 10 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh ra setclearpwd ivf-signer-1 changeit 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca /opt/keyfactor/bin/ejbca.sh createcert --username ivf-signer-1 --password changeit -c /tmp/signer-csr.pem -f /tmp/signer-signed.pem 2>&1 && echo "--- Cert signed ---" && docker exec ivf-ejbca cat /tmp/signer-signed.pem | docker exec -i ivf-signserver bash -c "cat > /tmp/signer-signed.pem" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver /opt/signserver/bin/signserver uploadsignercertificate 1 /tmp/signer-signed.pem -pem 2>&1 && echo "--- Upload CA chain ---" && docker exec ivf-signserver cat /opt/keyfactor/persistent/keys/ca-chain.pem 2>/dev/null | docker exec -i ivf-signserver bash -c "cat > /tmp/ca-chain.pem" 2>/dev/null; MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver /opt/signserver/bin/signserver uploadsignercertificatechain 1 /tmp/ca-chain.pem -pem 2>&1; MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver /opt/signserver/bin/signserver reload 1 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver /opt/signserver/bin/signserver getstatus brief 1 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-ejbca bash -c "sed -n '/-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----/,/-----END CERTIFICATE-----/p' /tmp/signer-signed.pem" > D:/Pr.Net/IVF/tmp/signer-signed.pem 2>&1 && cat D:/Pr.Net/IVF/tmp/signer-signed.pem | head -3 && echo "..." && wc -l D:/Pr.Net/IVF/tmp/signer-signed.pem)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker cp D:/Pr.Net/IVF/tmp/signer-signed.pem ivf-signserver:/tmp/signer-signed.pem 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver /opt/signserver/bin/signserver uploadsignercertificate 1 GLOB /tmp/signer-signed.pem 2>&1 && echo "=== Upload chain ===" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker cp D:/Pr.Net/IVF/certs/ca-chain.pem ivf-signserver:/tmp/ca-chain.pem 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver /opt/signserver/bin/signserver uploadsignercertificatechain 1 GLOB /tmp/ca-chain.pem 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver /opt/signserver/bin/signserver reload 1 2>&1 && echo "=== Status ===" && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec ivf-signserver /opt/signserver/bin/signserver getstatus brief 1 2>&1)
